title: RoomCollection manifest (DRAFT v0.1, additive composition layer — ADR 0049)
description: Manifest for an ordered bundle of N independent single-room captures. Refs are RELATIVE to the manifest's own directory. Per-room 'offset' (optional) is a USER-SUPPLIED translation into a shared building frame — roomestim never infers inter-room pose; absent ⇒ identity. Carries NO aggregate acoustics (per-room only); roomestim does not infer multi-room from one capture.

combined_ref.description: Optional path (RELATIVE to the manifest directory) to a combined glTF/GLB visual assembly of the rooms at their user-supplied offsets. A visual assembly only — no aggregate acoustics.

combined_usd_ref.description: Optional path (RELATIVE to the manifest directory) to a combined USD visual assembly of the rooms at their user-supplied offsets. A visual assembly only — no aggregate acoustics.

room_ref.description: Path to the per-room room.yaml, RELATIVE to the manifest directory.

layout_ref.description: Path to the per-room layout.yaml, RELATIVE to the manifest directory; null when the room has no placement.

offset.description: Optional USER-SUPPLIED translation [x, y, z] in metres into a shared building frame. Absent ⇒ identity (no shift). roomestim never infers this.
